arts.ttl: Ranieri Confirms Final Derby as Roma Boss Ahead of Lazio Showdown
arts.sum: Roma head coach Claudio Ranieri addressed the press ahead of tonight's Derby della Capitale against fiercest Serie A rivals Lazio. The 73-year-old confirmed it would be his last derby as a manager as he intends to return to retirement at the end of the season. The post Ranieri Confirms Final Derby as Roma Boss Ahead of Lazio Showdown appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Lazio vs. Roma, the eternal derby
arts.sum: Roma have not conceded any goals in their last three derbies against Lazio in the Italian top-flight and only twice in Serie A history have the Giallorossi kept four clean sheets in a row against the Biancocelesti: between 1943 and 1947 and between 1959 and 1960. Lazio are unbeaten in their last nine home games against Roma in all competitions (W6 D3), already a record run for the Biancocelesti in home games in the Rome derby – the Giallorossi’s last away win dates back to 04/12/2016 in Serie A (0-2 with goals scored by Strootman and Nainggolan).
